caption: An award winning photography of the interior of a modern office.

segments_info.text: A room that is painted red inside, with red chairs and furniture. People are having a meeting inside.
A room that is painted green, with a green desk.
A conference room that is painted blue, with blue chairs inside and light fixtures on the ceiling
A hallway that is painted yellow with a light fixture inside.
A hallway that is painted lime green with windows.
